interaction_phrase: US-India Quantum Coordination Mechanism
occurrence_sentence: Within this, the US-India Quantum Coordination Mechanism is facilitating bilateral cooperation in Quantum Information Science and Technology, including workshops on post-quantum cryptography and quantum hardware, and enabling visits of Indian technical experts to U.S. quantum institutions and national laboratories.

interaction_phrase: US-India Transforming the Relationship Utilizing Strategic Technology
occurrence_sentence: U.S.-India Transforming the Relationship Utilizing Strategic Technology (US-India TRUST) [95] initiative was announced in February 2025, which aims to catalyse government-to-government, academia and private sector collaboration to promote the application of critical and emerging technologies in areas like defence, artificial intelligence, semiconductors, quantum, biotechnology, energy and space.
